positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a nocturnal cityscape silhouette, viewed from an elevated perspective. The foreground features stylized, geometric silhouettes of palm trees and exotic foliage, creating a strong contrast against a vibrant, gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to electric magenta and soft teal at the horizon line. Incorporate subtle, glowing neon accents (like stylized window lights or abstract energy streaks) in cool tones (cyan, lavender) that contrast sharply with the warm, dark tones of the night sky. The composition must be centrally balanced, ideal for a repeat pattern or large print on apparel. Focus on strong outlines and flat color blocking to ensure print scalability. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, vector art style, Ukiyo-e influence meets modern vaporwave aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, text, signature, watermark, logos, extra limbs, deformed, poor anatomy, noisy, grayscale, busy, photorealistic, bokeh
